ddls:
CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser */,
  "browser_name" TEXT /* Name of the browser */,
  "first_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the browser was first released */,
  "last_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the browser was last released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the browser */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the browser */,
  "last_version_number" TEXT /* Last version number of the browser */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the browser is currently active */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the browser's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the browser's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "first_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the operating system was first released */,
  "last_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the operating system was last released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the operating system */,
  "last_version_number" TEXT /* Last version number of the operating system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the operating system is currently active */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the operating system's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the operating system's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_os_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support record */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system */,
  "support_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the browser started supporting the operating system */,
  "support_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the browser stopped supporting the operating system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of support (e.g., No, Terminated, Supported) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the support status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the support status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_os_support_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_os_support_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser version */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the browser */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL where the version can be downloaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the download file */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or list of changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_versions_browser_id FOREIGN KEY ("browser_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "os_versions" (
  "os_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system version */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the operating system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL where the version can be downloaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the download file */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or list of changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_os_versions_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browser_os_version_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the browser version */,
  "os_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system version */,
  "support_start_date" TEXT /* Date the browser version started supporting the operating system version */,
  "support_end_date" TEXT /* Date the browser version stopped supporting the operating system version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of support (e.g., No, Terminated, Supported) */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the support status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the support status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_os_version_support_os_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("os_version_id") REFERENCES os_versions ("os_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browser_os_version_support_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES browser_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (browser or operating system) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., browser, os) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the note (e.g., official documentation, news article) */,
  "references" TEXT /* URLs or references for the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_notes_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES browsers ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_notes_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the tag */,
  "is_system_tag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is a system-defined tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
